pi_items.source: Analyzed seed_demodb.py: 17 profiles with 11 distinct nationalities (American, Australian, British, Dutch, French, German, Greek, Italian, Japanese, Mexican, Spanish)
Analyzed friend_pairs in seed_demodb.py (lines 361-372): 10 friendship pairs that map to 10 nationality-level edges when aggregated alphabetically
Analyzed all 10 friend_pairs in seed_demodb.py: No French-German edges exist in the data. No profile from French nationality has HasFriend edge to/from German nationality.
Analyzed all 10 friend_pairs in seed_demodb.py: No French-German edges exist in the data. No profile from German nationality has HasFriend edge to/from French nationality.

Analysis of seed_demodb.py shows all 10 nationality-level edges have count=1. Strongest edges are American-British, American-Mexican, American-Spanish, British-British, Dutch-German, French-Greek, French-Spanish, German-German, German-Italian, and Japanese-Japanese, all with count=1.
Profile list in seed_demodb.py (lines 194-212): david.jones@example.com (British), emma.white@example.com (British), seari@ubu.edu (British)
Profile list in seed_demodb.py (lines 194-212): john.smith@example.com (American), domi@nek.gov (American)
Profile list in seed_demodb.py (lines 194-212): sophie.martin@example.com (French), clara.dubois@example.com (French)
Profile list in seed_demodb.py (lines 194-212): anna.mueller@example.com (German), thomas.schafer@example.com (German)
Profile list in seed_demodb.py (lines 194-212): yuki.tanaka@example.com (Japanese), kai.yamamoto@example.com (Japanese)
Task description and export_result.sh specify this path (line 9)

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetic data created by seed_demodb.py with 17 profiles across 11 nationalities. The profile count distribution is verified: British (3), American (2), French (2), German (2), Japanese (2), and Spanish (1). However, critical metadata about edge counts is incorrect. The seed data contains exactly 10 friendship pairs that aggregate to 10 nationality-level edges when ordered alphabetically, not 14 as claimed. Furthermore, the metadata claims the strongest connection is French-German with count 2, but no French-German edge exists in the seed data; all edges have count 1.
